review_questions: Does P4-SPEC-03 bind approved P4-SPEC-02, approved P4-SPEC-01, and current P3_BUILD_LOCK as upstream authority?
Do golden, integration, and release suite contracts cover deterministic output, gate stops, package dry-run, example smoke, and readiness evidence?
Does v3.1 migration coverage force every legacy capability into a supported status with evidence and rationale?
Do package and example manifests have enough fields to validate path safety and smoke behavior?
Does release readiness distinguish eligibility from DRD_HARNESS_RELEASE_LOCK creation?
Does this candidate avoid repository implementation, lock creation, package publishing, prior candidate mutation, root P4 file mutation, commit, and push?
